templates: Hey {first_name}, it's {owner_name} from {business_name}. Saw your enquiry about discovery meeting. Is this around investing, super, retirement, or insurance? Quick call today?
Hi {first_name}, thanks for reaching out about discovery meeting. What's prompted the look at this right now? Got 5 minutes to chat?
{first_name}, {owner_name} here from {business_name}. Re your discovery meeting enquiry: Are you currently advised or DIY? What's a good time?
instant_sms.ps: PS. You can reply STOP anytime and we'll take you off the list. ABN on file, address in our reply email.
